patterns.name: UNSAFE_INNERHTML_ASSIGNMENT
patterns.description: Direct .innerHTML = assignment bypasses Angular's XSS sanitisation
patterns.message: Use Angular [innerHTML] binding or DomSanitizer.bypassSecurityTrustHtml() to prevent XSS

patterns.name: SQL_STRING_CONCATENATION
patterns.description: SQL query built by string concatenation opens SQL-injection surface
patterns.message: Use parameterized queries: EF Core, Dapper, or SqlCommand.Parameters

patterns.name: DATETIME_NOW_INSTEAD_OF_TIMEPROVIDER
patterns.description: DateTime.Now is non-deterministic and untestable; dotnet>=8 ships TimeProvider
patterns.message: Inject TimeProvider (Microsoft.Extensions.Time.Testing) instead of DateTime.Now for testability
